titleEn: Pig ProgressYoung pig farmers gain global perspective at agri benchmark AcademyJun 22News
titleZh: 全球青年养猪人齐聚芬兰，agri benchmark学院聚焦智慧畜牧与全球视野
summaryZh: 第三届agri benchmark学院于2025年6月2-4日在芬兰塞伊奈约基举办，面向全球青年养猪人。活动通过工作坊、演讲和农场参观，探讨了国际竞争力、农场数据应用、数字化、人工智能、摄像头牲畜监测、动物福利、社交媒体等热点议题。该学院由非营利组织agri benchmark运营，旨在培养下一代养猪业人才，促进全球视角下的知识交流。
featuredReason: 该新闻展示了全球青年养猪人如何通过国际平台学习AI、摄像头监测、数据驱动管理等智慧畜牧技术，对关注养猪业数字化转型和人才培养的从业者具有启发意义。
contentFull: Young pig farmers gain global perspective at agri benchmark AcademyThe third annual agri benchmark Academy, a 3-day event for young pig farmers from around the world, took place from 2 to 4 June in Seinäjoki, Finland. Held annually since 2024, the Academy is designed to enable participants to exchange views on “hot issues in a global context”.Treena HeinCorrespondentJun 22NewsPhoto: agri benchmark Academy“The Academy is an international initiative for the next generation of pig production,” says Dr Mandes Verhaagh. He is project manager at global networks, a German company that works with the non-profit Thünen Institute of Farm Economics in Germany to operate agri benchmark, the Academy’s non-profit parent organisation.Global networkagri benchmark is a global network of agricultural economists, advisers, producers and livestock sector specialists. In addition to pigs, the agri benchmark Network also covers beef, sheep, cash crops, poultry, horticulture and aquaculture/fishing. The Academy programme enables young pig farmers to strengthen their skills and knowledge in farm management, global economics, biosecurity, technology and environmental analysis through interactive workshops, presentations and farm visits.“Alongside international competitiveness and the use of farm data, discussions addressed modern value chains, digitalisation, artificial intelligence, camera-based livestock monitoring, modern farm technologies, animal welfare, communication and the growing role of social media in agriculture,” says Verhaagh. “The technical programme is complemented by farm visits and direct exchange with international experts and practitioners.”Pig Academy 2026The 3-day agri benchmark 2026 Academy programme began on June 2 with presentations on the global pig sector, including updates from 12 countries. Participants also attended workshops and presentations on sustainable production, data-driven decision-making and welfare best practice at Finnish pig farming company Atria. Another presentation explained how agri benchmark research on farm data is carried out.On June 3, attendees took part in the Global Forum on Pig Production. The Global Forum included a presentation on agri benchmark international comparisons and decision-making. Topigs Norsvin gave a presentation on AI, while VetVise presented on the use of data from cameras and other sources. Big Dutchman presented technologies to support data-driven management, and LeeO discussed future digitalisation opportunities in pig farming. There were also presentations on barn air quality and how social media is changing the image of pig production.Partners and sponsorsOn the final day, June 4, participants visited several finishing and sow farms in the area. Verhaagh says the rapid establishment of the agri benchmark Academy as an international platform would not have been possible without the commitment of its sponsors and partners. The many partners of the agri benchmark Network include public and private institutions and companies, which provide funding either through sponsorship, receiving data and knowledge in return, or through specific projects.
translationZh:
第三届年度agri benchmark学院，一项面向全球青年养猪人的为期三天的活动，于6月2日至4日在芬兰塞伊奈约基举行。自2024年起每年举办，该学院旨在让参与者就“全球背景下的热点问题”交流观点。

“该学院是养猪业下一代的一项国际倡议，”Mandes Verhaagh博士说。他是德国公司global networks的项目经理，该公司与非营利组织德国图能农场经济研究所合作运营agri benchmark，即该学院的非营利母组织。

**全球网络**
agri benchmark是一个由农业经济学家、顾问、生产者和畜牧业专家组成的全球网络。除养猪业外，agri benchmark网络还涵盖肉牛、绵羊、大田作物、家禽、园艺和水产养殖/渔业。该学院项目通过互动工作坊、演讲和农场参观，帮助青年养猪人加强在农场管理、全球经济、生物安全、技术和环境分析方面的技能和知识。

“除了国际竞争力和农场数据的使用，讨论还涉及现代价值链、数字化、人工智能、基于摄像头的牲畜监测、现代农场技术、动物福利、沟通以及社交媒体在农业中日益增长的作用，”Verhaagh说。“技术项目辅以农场参观以及与国际专家和从业者的直接交流。”

**2026年养猪学院**
为期三天的agri benchmark 2026学院项目于6月2日开始，内容包括全球养猪业概况介绍，以及来自12个国家的更新报告。参与者还在芬兰养猪公司Atria参加了关于可持续生产、数据驱动决策和福利最佳实践的研讨会和演讲。另一场演讲解释了agri benchmark如何开展农场数据研究。

6月3日，与会者参加了全球养猪生产论坛。该论坛包括一场关于agri benchmark国际比较和决策的演讲。Topigs Norsvin就人工智能发表了演讲，而VetVise则介绍了来自摄像头和其他来源的数据使用情况。Big Dutchman展示了支持数据驱动管理的技术，LeeO讨论了养猪业未来的数字化机遇。还有关于猪舍空气质量以及社交媒体如何改变养猪业形象的演讲。

**合作伙伴与赞助商**
在最后一天，6月4日，参与者参观了该地区的几个育肥场和母猪场。Verhaagh表示，agri benchmark学院作为国际平台的迅速建立，离不开其赞助商和合作伙伴的承诺。agri benchmark网络的众多合作伙伴包括公共和私营机构。
author: Treena Hein
